ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month and year of the transaction */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the property is located */,
  "flat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of flat */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block number of the property */,
  "street_name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the street name where the property is located */,
  "storey_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storey range of the property */,
  "floor_area_sqm" REAL /* Floor area of the property in square meters */,
  "flat_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flat model */,
  "lease_commence_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease commenced */,
  "remaining_lease" TEXT /* Remaining lease period in years */,
  "resale_price" REAL /* Resale price of the property in Singapore dollars */,
  "sqft" REAL /* Floor area of the property in square feet */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller of the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed for sale */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Actual date of the transaction */,
  "estimated_value" REAL /* Estimated market value of the property at the time of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_storey_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("storey_range_id") REFERENCES storey_ranges ("storey_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_street_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_name_id") REFERENCES street_names ("street_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_flat_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("flat_model_id") REFERENCES flat_models ("flat_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_flat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("flat_type_id") REFERENCES flat_types ("flat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the town is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the town */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the town */,
  "average_home_price" REAL /* Average home price in the town */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the town */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the town */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the town (e.g., parks, schools, shopping centers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_types" (
  "flat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat type */,
  "flat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flat type */,
  "average_floor_area" REAL /* Average floor area for the flat type */,
  "average_price_per_sqm" REAL /* Average price per square meter for the flat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "street_names" (
  "street_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street name */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the street is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available on the street */,
  "proximity_to_public_transport" TEXT /* Proximity to public transport (e.g., bus stops, MRT stations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("street_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_street_names_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storey_ranges" (
  "storey_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storey range */,
  "storey_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the storey range */,
  "average_price_per_sqm" REAL /* Average price per square meter for the storey range */,
  "average_floor_area" REAL /* Average floor area for the storey range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storey_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_models" (
  "flat_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat model */,
  "flat_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flat model */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the flat model */,
  "average_floor_area" REAL /* Average floor area for the flat model */,
  "modernization_year" TEXT /* Year the flat model was last modernized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flat_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, buyer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the transaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the transaction */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the user's session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
